ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Continued To Oct-02-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearances either side. Osc and sanctions in the amount of $250.00 to plaintiff's attorney, Joseph A. Filippelli payable on or before 8/29/02 to the court for failure to appear at the 8/14/02 order to show cause hearing. Order to show cause continued to 10/2/02 to file proof of service, obtain answer from or enter default of defendant Tilin Lovell Berstein. Mary Hinds, CSR. Jean Tualla, Clerk; #212.
